name: M9 minimal medium + 25% Cryptococcus five-day spent media (PMC10409787)
description: M9 minimal medium + 25% Cryptococcus five-day spent media — medium reported in PMC10409787, extracted for GrowthDB and mapped to BiGG.

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10409787 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Composition mapped to BiGG (mapper + salt dissociation); presence-based bounds; paper_amount retained. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: paper-verified (complete recipe; cited + supplementary sources chased)
provenance.base_expansion: Base 'M9' expanded to standard composition: M9 minimal medium (Sambrook & Russell 2001): Na2HPO4, KH2PO4, NaCl, NH4Cl, MgSO4, CaCl2 + carbon source.
provenance.verification_evidence: solid M9 minimal media (0.4 g/L glucose, 2 mM MgSO4, 0.1 mM NaCl, 0.048 mM Na2HPO4.7H2O, 0.022 mM KH2PO4, 0.017 mM NaCl, 15 g/L agar)
provenance.base_medium: M9 minimal medium (liquid; composition as defined inline in the paper's Methods, agar omitted for liquid culture)

sources_chased.how: read corpus JATS full text; the Methods define M9 inline with NO external citation, so there is no cited recipe to chase

sources_chased.what: supplementary materials (Supplementary Information PDF; Supplementary data 1-3)
sources_chased.how: reviewed main text references to supplements; they concern genome/vitamin-pathway data, not media composition

missing_before: explicit identity of the 25% Cryptococcus spent-media supplement and its ~5 mg/L pantothenate
recuration.notes: Paper defines M9 inline (Methods, 'Isolate culturing and co-culturing'); there is no cited base-medium reference to expand. The stated recipe contains NO nitrogen source (no NH4Cl/ammonium), NO CaCl2, and NO trace metals or vitamin mix anywhere in the article (verified by full-text search) - therefore the ammonium, calcium, Co2+, Cu, Fe2+, Fe3+, Mn, and Zn entries in current_components are NOT supported by this paper and were dropped. Printed phosphate values (0.048/0.022 mM) are ~1000x below standard M9 and are almost certainly a units typo, but are reported verbatim per the no-fabrication ru

uncovered.name: disodium hydrogen phosphate heptahydrate
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: sodium chloride [second listed aliquot]
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: -pantothenate
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation
